--- Kor — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):10+1=11 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)

→ Mage: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 3/5 targets affected.

→ Kor — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 30 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
